author: @marcelkargul
text:
How to design the perfect mobile app:

- Consistent spacing
- Light drop shadows
- 430px width, 932px height
- Great typography (Inter, Geist, SF pro)

Take notes! https://t.co/t7jnDkqm28 https://t.co/wgpEmIbhQT
